title: The Outlook for Energy Costs in Rural Alaska in 2020
summary: By Meera Kohler About 15% of all Alaskans live in some 200 rural communities spread across more than 500,000 square miles. 32,000 (33%) of those live in one of 58 communities served by AVEC. Our communities, sadly, have the highest cost of living of anywhere in the United States. Rural households spend 27% of their annual income on home energy, compar...
